NH · Year 9 · 2026 🌱
9 years of dirt under the fingernails. Zero regrets.

Part garden archive. Part field journal. Part outlet for when the peat moss strips fall apart at exactly the wrong moment. All of it real.

New England Grower Zone 5b · Southern NH Meticulous · Grumpy · Optimistic MA 2017–2020 · NH 2020–Present
Explore the Garden Read Field Notes
↓ scroll to dig in

This is my archive.
Everything I've learned lives here.

I started growing in 2017 in Massachusetts, mostly guessing. I'm now in year 9 in southern NH and the garden is bigger, the mistakes are more interesting, and Bohdi is always in the way.

This site exists so I can look back — and so anyone who finds it as fun as I do can look too. I'm not hiding my experience and I'm not flaunting it. It's just documented.

"Try first. Look up later. See what happens." — the method, basically.

Field Notes

The Blog

Where the growing, the grumbling, and the occasional breakthrough get written down.
Latest Rant Origin Story · Seed Starting
The Peat Moss Incident That Started All of This

I just wanted to get a head start before the next day. A 32-pack of Jiffy strips, a quiet evening, and a simple plan. Then the tray started falling apart and I got angrier than any gardener has a right to get — and then something clicked.

March 2026 · The one that started it all
 Technique · Crowd Planting
What Happens When You Refuse to Give Plants Personal Space

Conventional wisdom says give everything room. I disagreed. Here's what happened.

Coming soon
 Crop Report · Green Beans
The Surprise of 2025: Bags and Bags of Green Beans

I planted them expecting decent results. What I got filled every bag I owned.

Coming soon

Bohdi

Mini Hippo · Shar-Pei / Cocker Spaniel · 1 Year Old · Chief Garden Inspector

Bohdi doesn't garden. He supervises. He sits in exactly the spot you need to kneel and doesn't move. He has never once let a suspicious squirrel go unchallenged and he has never once actually caught one. He is Year 9's most important addition to the operation.

Always underfoot. Always perfect. 🐾

Follow the Season

Real updates when something grows, something fails, or something annoys me enough to write about it. Which is more often than you'd think.

No fluff. No schedule. Just when there's something worth saying.
